Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add crash-proof session tracking system

Auto-checkpoint every 2 min + crash recovery + background agents

Features:
- checkpoint.sh: Auto-save daemon with SIGTERM handling
- resume.sh: Recovery engine for crash detection
- auto-resume.sh: Auto-suggest on folder open
- fast-start.sh: Sub-100ms response caching
- agentd.sh: Background parallel agent system
- self-improve.py: Auto-analysis and suggestions
- model-router.py: Haiku/Sonnet/Opus auto-select
- cost-tracker.py: API usage tracking
- GLOBAL_JOURNAL.md: Session history
- STATE.md: Per-project state tracking

Security:
- Updated .gitignore for tokens and temp files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push new-origin main)

import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/Users/raghavshah/free-claude-code'\)
from providers.nvidia_nim.request import build_request_body
from config.nim import NimSettings

class FakeReq:
    model = 'claude-3-opus'
    resolved_provider_model = 'nvidia_nim/mistralai/mistral-large-3-675b-instruct-2512'
    messages = [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Hi'}]
    max_tokens = 50
    temperature = None
    top_p = None
    top_k = None
    stop = None
    extra_body = None

nim = NimSettings\(\)
body = build_request_body\(FakeReq\(\), nim\)
print\('chat_template in extra_body:', 'chat_template' in body.get\('extra_body', {}\)\)
print\('chat_template_kwargs in extra_body:', 'chat_template_kwargs' in body.get\('extra_body', {}\)\)

from providers.nvidia_nim.request import build_request_body
from config.nim import NimSettings

class FakeReq:
    model = 'claude-3-opus'
    resolved_provider_model = 'nvidia_nim/mistralai/mistral-large-3-675b-instruct-2512'
    messages = [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'Hi'}]
    max_tokens = 50
    temperature = None
    top_p = None
    top_k = None
    stop = None
    extra_body = None

nim = NimSettings\(\)
body = build_request_body\(FakeReq\(\), nim\)
print\('chat_template:', body.get\('extra_body', {}\).get\('chat_template', 'NOT SET'\)\)
print\('has chat_template:', 'chat_template' in body.get\('extra_body', {}\)\)
")
